basic_details.job_title: WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Women and Child Development Department Odisha
basic_details.short_information: Women and Child Development Department Odisha (WCD Odisha) Anganwadi Helper Notification 2026 has been released on 07 July 2026 on the official website https://engagement-awc.odisha.gov.in/. A total of 16 vacancies have been announced through the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Min: 18 years, Max: 35 years as of 01-01-2026
age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years (as of 01-01-2026)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WCD Odisha Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WCD Odisha to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download WCD Odisha Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download WCD Odisha Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: WCD Odisha Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the WCD Odisha Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download WCD Odisha Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years (as of 01-01-2026)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WCD Odisha Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WCD Odisha to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Anganwadi Helper posts is 29th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 16 vacancies announced for the Anganwadi Helper positions in the Women and Child Development Department Odisha.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for candidates applying for these posts is between 18 years and 35 years as of 1st January 2026. Age relaxation details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive, as per the available information.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for the WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for the WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026 is entirely online. Candidates need to visit the official website to fill out and submit their application forms.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The recruitment for Anganwadi Helper posts in WCD Odisha is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification PDF for WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains comprehensive details about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Anganwadi Helper posts?
faq.answer: The specific minimum qualification details are not provided in the extracted data. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for exact educational requirements.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for WCD Odisha recruitment?
faq.answer: The official website for WCD Odisha recruitment is www.engagement.awc.odisha.gov.in. All application-related activities will be conducted through this portal.

faq.question: Q10. When was the notification released for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification for the WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026 was released on 7th July 2026.
